chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-196 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No. 956/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General ************** Respondent No.4 filed parawise comments, same are taken on record, however he has denied the allegation leveled against him. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Record reflects that this petition was lastly fixed on 07.02.2023, wherein notices were ordered to be issued, thereafter no sincere efforts were made by the petitioner to proceed with the matter. In these circumstances, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with the listed application. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
